nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Sometimes the hardest part is realizing you were asked to move on without anything actually being repaired.

#healing #selfawareness #relationships

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Nobody tells you that emotional regulation looks like sitting in a room wanting to crawl out of your skin and saying nothing anyway. It’s the decision to stay when everything in you wants to run.

#regulation #relationships

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
If you can’t leave the narcissist in your life, stop trying to get them to see your perspective. Well, they won’t, and chasing that will destroy you.

There’s a strategy for this, and it starts with becoming the most boring person in the room.

Have you ever had to use this with someone in your life? 👇

#narcissistic #relationships

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Consistency in a relationship is about your partner knowing that after the hard stuff, you come back. That alone changes everything about how safe someone feels with you.

#RelationshipAdvice #CouplesTherapy #AttachmentStyles

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
The hardest moment in any argument is stopping yourself from saying anything after you’ve said enough. Most people blow it right there.

#relationshipadvice

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
The threat to leave during a fight is rarely about actually leaving. But it trains both people in the relationship to be a little more scared every single time. 

#RelationshipAdvice #CommunicationSkills #couplestherapy

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
The moment someone says “you hurt me” and the other person hears “you’re a bad person”, that’s where every repair attempt dies before it even starts.

Has this ever happened in one of your relationships? 👇

#RelationshipAdvice #CouplesTherapy #AttachmentStyles

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
There are people who love each other deeply and still can’t make it work. The question is whether you’re actually reaching each other  and whether what you have is worth mourning what you won’t.

Most couples just keep trying to communicate their way out of a decision.

#relationships #couplestherapy #selfawareness

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
There’s a certain point where you stop being in a rough patch and start just being in the relationship. Most people spend years figuring out which one it is.

#RelationshipAdvice #SelfAwareness #PersonalGrowth

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.

descripcion:
Chemistry fades. The couples who last 20 years knew what to look for instead.

#relationships #mutualinfluence #longtermrelationships

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:

descripcion:
Hinting is just asking with the vulnerability removed, and people can feel that.

#RelationshipPatterns #Communication #AttachmentStyles

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:

Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
The moment you start trying to manage your partner you stop having a partner... you have a project. Nobody wants to be someone’s project, so they will probably push back, shut down, dig in, and you end up more stuck than before you said anything.

#relationship #communication #selfawareness

#RelationshipAdvice #CommunicationSkills #CouplesTherapy

bio:

descripcion:
Credits to: @wesaiditanyway 

Everyone wants an emotionally intelligent partner…until they actually have one. Because they hold up a mirror and most people aren’t ready for that.

Are you actually ready to be truly seen? 👇

#EmotionalIntelligence #RelationshipAdvice

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Most people leave relationships saying “I loved them so much.” Love was never the problem. The part nobody talks about is whether both people were actually willing to be changed by each other. That’s a different question entirely.

#RelationshipAdvice #HealthyRelationships #CouplesTherapy

bio:

descripcion:

Comment REPAIR and I’ll send you the free PDF with scripts for when the timing is actually right. 👇

#communication #relationships #conflictresolution

#relationships #personalgrowth #selfawareness

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
What breaks a relationship is bringing something painful to someone and watching them turn it into a debate about whether you’re right to feel it.

You can love a person completely and still not be able to build anything with them if they can’t let your pain land.

#relationships #attachmentstyle #emotionalintelligence

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:

Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
“I’m doing my best” can be the most honest thing your partner has ever said…or the excuse keeping you stuck for years.

Have you ever stayed too long waiting for a “best” that never changed? 👇

#RelationshipAdvice #CouplesTherapy

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
Anxious attachment feels like paying attention, being careful, not wanting to get hurt again...The exhausting part is that it never actually stops the hurt.
Which side do you recognize yourself on more? 👇

#relationshipadvice #anxious

nombre: Baya Voce | Relationship Repair Expert | Columbia University
bio:
If you want a healthy relationship, repair is non-negotiable. I help you learn how.
Supervision w/ Esther Perel
Couples Research @columbia @maps__org
descripcion:
You can know every communication technique in the book and still blow up over nothing if your body is working against you. Therapy is great. But it can’t fix what a blood test might explain.

#RelationshipAdvice #HormoneHealth #MentalHealth

bio:
❤️ Author. TEDx Speaker. Podcaster.
Mindset, confidence & self-trust
📖 Author of Give Yourself Permission
descripcion:
I’ve been rethinking what “good communication” actually means.

For a long time, I thought it meant being articulate, having the right words, knowing how to explain things clearly.
And those things matter… but not as much as I thought.

What matters more is something else entirely:
How well you actually listen.

Not just waiting your turn.
Not just gathering information.
But being fully present with what and who is in front of you.

That’s when communication changes.
Conversations go deeper.
People open up differently.
Things start to move that didn’t before.

It almost feels like magic.

#communication #communicationskills #selfawarenessjourney #personalgrowth #socialskills
